title: Draper TCT Tile and Glass Drill Bit, 5.0 x 84 mm - 10057 - For Tiles, Ceramics, Marble, Glass and Mirrors
features: Precise drill bits made from carbon steel
Professionally ground tungsten carbide tip for a faster cut
Designed for drilling tiles, ceramics, marble, glass and mirrors
Double flute design provides rapid stock removal
Fitted with a non-slip shank to prevent slippage
Also suitable for use on brick, concrete, stone, slate, wood and hard plastics
description: The Draper Tile and Glass Series are precise drill bits with a spear-shaped tip designed for drilling tiles, ceramics, marble, glass and mirrors. Made from carbon steel with a professionally ground tungsten carbide tip for a faster cut and longer service life. Double flute design prevents material from clogging the hole, providing rapid stock removal. Fitted with a non-slip shank to prevent slippage. The TCT tip and double flute mean these drill bits are also suitable for use on brick, concrete, stone, slate, wood and hard plastics. Compatible with a standard 10/13mm chuck.
